title: parablechnum squamatum
intro: Parablechnum squamatum, also known as the hairy fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Parablechnum squamatum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the fronds, which can be made into teas, infusions, or powders for medicinal use.
